Composition.Programmer 1: Fix and implement the backend code in Python using Flask framework to serve the correct RestaurantReservation application. Ensure the root URL '/' serves the provided RestaurantReservation index.html page with the dashboard page and welcome message as specified. Implement routing for all frontend pages, ensuring each route corresponds to the frontend code. Implement file read and write operations for all data files (users.txt, menu.txt, reservations.txt, waitlist.txt, reviews.txt) starting from the first line, using plain text without encryption. Serve the frontend files (index.html, styles.css, app.js) as static files. Ensure the backend supports all functionalities described in the original task, including user management, menu browsing, reservations, waitlist, reviews, and profile management. The current issue is that the backend is serving an unrelated "Auction Dashboard" page instead of the RestaurantReservation dashboard page, so the backend must be corrected to serve the correct application and routes.

Composition.Programmer 1:
Test whether the website can be accessed through local port 5000. In this test, you only need to test whether the first page of the website can be accessed through the local 5000 port.

Task 3  Test the elements and integrity of ALL pages. This includes verifying the presence and correctness of all specified elements on each page as per the requirements
